name: Prompt MCP Server
description: Prompt generation MCP server: generates the full LLM prompt including system prompt, thread context, and message compaction

config_schema.label: Complexity Max Chars
config_schema.description: Max character count for simple prompts (greetings, short commands): these get no plan

config_schema.label: Plan Max Tokens
config_schema.description: Maximum tokens for the planning LLM call

config_schema.label: Memory Max Chars
config_schema.description: Maximum characters for the memory section in the system prompt

config_schema.label: Soul (User Profile) Max Chars
config_schema.description: Maximum characters for the user profile section in the system prompt

config_schema.label: Tokenizer Encoding
config_schema.description: Tokenizer encoding for budget calculations (e.g. 'cl100k_base'). Empty = use character counts instead of tokens

config_schema.label: Char Budget Soft
config_schema.description: Soft character budget: triggers condensation when exceeded and enough iterations have passed since last condense

config_schema.label: Char Budget Hard
config_schema.description: Hard character budget: condensation triggers immediately when exceeded

config_schema.label: Token Budget Soft
config_schema.description: Soft token budget (used when tokenizer_encoding is set)

config_schema.label: Token Budget Hard
config_schema.description: Hard token budget (used when tokenizer_encoding is set)

config_schema.label: Old Message Char Budget
config_schema.description: Threshold for trimming old assistant messages during condensation

config_schema.label: Condense Keep Turns
config_schema.description: Number of most recent assistant turns to preserve when condensing
